model_card.card_text: Claude Mythos Preview is tracked from BenchLM as a current closed reasoning frontier model. BenchLM reference: rank #1, overall score 83.

DeepSeek V4 Pro (Max) is a comparative catalog entry for DeepSeek.

Weekly tokens: 15.9B.
Context Window: 1,048,576 tokens.
Released: 2026-04-23.
Pricing: $0.435 per 1M input tokens and $0.87 per 1M output tokens.
Capabilities: text, reasoning, coding, agentic, function calling, long context, rag.

BenchLM reference: rank #2, overall score 73.
Claude Opus 4.6 is tracked from BenchLM as a superseded closed standard frontier model. BenchLM reference: rank #3, overall score 72.

Claude Opus 4.7 (Adaptive) is a comparative catalog entry for Anthropic.

Weekly tokens: 1.17T.
Context Window: 1,000,000 tokens.
Released: 2026-04-16.
Pricing: $5 per 1M input tokens and $25 per 1M output tokens.
Capabilities: text, reasoning, coding, agentic, long context, safety.

BenchLM reference: rank #5, overall score 71.

Kimi 2.6 is Moonshot AI's highest-capability frontier model.

Architecture: sparse mixture-of-experts with 384 experts and 8 active experts per token, 32B active parameters from about 1T total.
Context Window: 256K tokens.
Released: 2026-04-20.
Benchmarks:
- SWE-bench Pro: 58.6%
- SWE-bench Verified: 70.8%
- SWE-bench Multilingual: 76.7%
- HLE with Tools: 54.0%
- Toolathlon: 50.0%
- AA Intelligence Index: 54.0
Capabilities: native text, image, and video understanding, broad reasoning, coordinated swarms up to 300 sub-agents across 4,000 steps, configurable reasoning effort, advanced multimodal coding.
Public sources: OpenRouter, HuggingFace model card, Moonshot AI docs, Artificial Analysis.
Positioning: highest Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index in this frontier cloud set.

Comparative metadata: weekly tokens 1.28T; context window 256,000 tokens; released 2026-04-20; pricing $0.7448/M input and $4.655/M output.

BenchLM reference: rank #6, overall score 70.
DeepSeek V4 Pro (High) is tracked from BenchLM as a current open reasoning frontier model. BenchLM reference: rank #7, overall score 70.

Claude Opus 4.5 demonstrates exceptional performance across multiple benchmarks: 89.2% on SWE-bench Verified, 90.1% on MMLU, 94.7% on HumanEval, 82.4% on GPQA Diamond, and 96.8% on GSM8K. The model achieves 85.3% on MATH and 76.2% on TruthfulQA, showcasing strong reasoning and safety characteristics.

BenchLM reference: rank #9, overall score 68.

Kimi K2.5 is Moonshot AI's multimodal frontier agent model.

Architecture: sparse mixture-of-experts with 384 experts and 8 active experts per token, 32B active parameters from about 1T total.
Context Window: 262K tokens.
Released: 2026-01-27.
Benchmarks:
- SWE-bench Verified: 70.8%
- MMMU: 85.0
- AA Intelligence Index: 47.0
Capabilities: native text and image understanding, strong multimodal coding, coordinated agent swarms up to 100 sub-agents and 1,500 tool calls, long-context reasoning.
Public sources: OpenRouter, HuggingFace model card, Moonshot AI docs, Artificial Analysis.
Value note: cheaper than K2.6 while keeping the slightly larger context window.

BenchLM reference: rank #11, overall score 68.

DeepSeek V3.2 is an open-source model achieving 76.8% on SWE-bench Verified, 86.4% on MMLU, and 87.9% on HumanEval pass@1. It scores 72.3% on GPQA Diamond, 94.1% on GSM8K, and 79.8% on MATH. Performance on TruthfulQA stands at 68.9%.

Nemotron-3-Super Cloud is NVIDIA's long-context and IT-automation specialist.

Architecture: LatentMoE combining Mamba-2 state-space layers, MoE layers, attention, and multi-token prediction, 12B active parameters from 120B total.
Context Window: 1000000 tokens natively.
Released: 2026-03-11.
Benchmarks:
- LiveCodeBench: 81.2%
- GPQA: 82.7%
- AIME25: 90.2
- HMMT: 93.7
- WMT24++: 86.67
Capabilities: million-token context, IT ticket automation, multilingual enterprise workflows across 7 languages, speculative decoding, low-cost agentic applications.
Public sources: OpenRouter, NVIDIA docs, HuggingFace model card, Artificial Analysis.
Value note: cheapest input pricing in this frontier cloud set, with a free tier reported on OpenRouter.

Qwen 3.5 (397B) Cloud is Qwen's broadest-capability multimodal flagship.

Architecture: sparse mixture-of-experts with gated delta networks and 512 experts, 17B active parameters from 397B total.
Context Window: 262,144 tokens.
Released: 2026-02-16.
Benchmarks:
- MMLU-Pro: 87.8%
- GPQA: 88.4%
- SWE-bench Verified: 76.4%
- HMMT: 94.8
- AIME26: 91.3
- OCRBench: 93.1
- MathVision: 88.6
- OmniDocBench: 90.8
- VideoMME: 87.5
- MMLU-ProX: 84.7
- TAU2-Bench: 86.7
- SWE-bench Multi: 69.3
- BrowseComp: 69.0 / 78.6
- CountBench: 97.2
Capabilities: strong coding, top-tier OCR and document reasoning, multilingual support across 201 languages and dialects, text-image-video input, strong math and vision.
Public sources: OpenRouter, HuggingFace model card, Qwen docs, Artificial Analysis.
Positioning: the most rounded multimodal, multilingual, and coding-capable generalist in this set.

Comparative metadata: weekly tokens 103B; context window 262,144 tokens; released 2026-02-16; pricing $0.39/M input and $2.34/M output.
model_card.architecture: MoE (Gated DeltaNet + Sparse MoE, 512 experts, 10+1 active)

model_card.card_text:
DeepSeek-V4-Flash Cloud is DeepSeek's ultra-efficient frontier long-context model.

Architecture: mixture-of-experts with compressed sparse attention and heavily compressed attention, 13B active parameters from 284B total.
Context Window: 1,048,576 tokens.
Released: 2026-04-23.
Benchmarks:
- SWE-bench Verified: 80.6%
- GPQA Diamond: 89.4%
- HMMT: 94.8
- ArenaHard: 92.3%
- IFBench: 79.2%
- AA Intelligence Index: 46.5
- Hallucination Rate: 4.2%
Capabilities: million-token retrieval and reasoning, low-cost coding, configurable reasoning modes, strong production software engineering, long-context research and RAG.
Public sources: OpenRouter, HuggingFace model card, DeepSeek docs, Artificial Analysis.
Notable strength: 4.2% hallucination rate in public Artificial Analysis reporting.

Comparative metadata: weekly tokens 62.9B; context window 1,048,576 tokens; released 2026-04-23; pricing $0.14/M input and $0.28/M output.

Gemini 2.5 Pro achieves 82.7% on SWE-bench Verified, 89.3% on MMLU, 91.6% on HumanEval, and 80.1% on GPQA Diamond. The model demonstrates 95.7% accuracy on GSM8K and 82.9% on MATH benchmark. It scores 72.8% on TruthfulQA.

DeepSeek R1 14B - Distilled reasoning model from 671B teacher. Architecture: MoE (Mixture-of-Experts). Activated parameters: 14B. Total teacher parameters: 671B. Max context: 128K tokens.

Benchmarks (full R1):
- MMLU: 90.8% (Pass@1)
- MMLU-Pro: 84.0%
- GPQA: 71.5% (Pass@1)
- AIME 2024: 79.8% (Pass@1)
- AIME 2025: 81.5%
- MATH-500: 97.3%
- LiveCodeBench: 65.9%
- SWE-bench Verified: 49.2%

Capabilities: Chain-of-thought reasoning, STEM problem solving, coding, long-context understanding. Distilled version for local deployment. MIT license. Licensed under MIT.

Devstral 2 123B Cloud is Mistral AI's dense coding specialist.

Architecture: dense transformer with 123B active parameters.
Context Window: 256K tokens.
Released: 2025-12-09.
Benchmarks:
- SWE-bench Verified: 72.2%
- GPQA: 59.4%
- Hallucination Rate: 14.9%
- Structured Output Error Rate: 0.13%
Capabilities: codebase exploration, multi-file edits, dependency-aware software engineering, retry-heavy coding agents, fine-tuning for enterprise codebases.
Public sources: OpenRouter, HuggingFace model card, Mistral AI docs, Artificial Analysis.
Notable strength: 14.9% hallucination rate and 0.13% structured output error rate in reported public evaluations.

GLM-5.1 Cloud is Z.ai's frontier open-weight coding and agentic model.

Architecture: GlmMoeDsa sparse mixture-of-experts with 256 routed experts plus 1 shared expert, 40B active parameters from 754B total.
Context Window: 202,752 tokens.
Released: 2026-04-07.
Benchmarks:
- SWE-bench Pro: 58.4%
- SWE-bench Verified: 77.8%
- GPQA: 86.8%
- AIME: 92.7%
- AA Intelligence Index: 51.4
- AA Coding Index: 43.4
- AA Agentic Index: 67.0
- Hallucination Rate: 70.6%
Capabilities: marathon autonomous coding sessions up to 8+ hours, strong tool use, software engineering, multilingual text reasoning.
Public sources: OpenRouter, HuggingFace model card, Z.ai developer docs, Artificial Analysis.
Notable caution: hallucination rate reported at 70.6% by Artificial Analysis.

Comparative metadata: weekly tokens 455B; context window 202,752 tokens; released 2026-04-07; pricing $1.05/M input and $3.5/M output.

MiniMax M2.7 Cloud is MiniMax's self-improving agentic frontier model.

Architecture: sparse mixture-of-experts with 256 experts and 8 active experts per token, 10B active parameters from 229B total.
Context Window: 196,608 tokens.
Released: 2026-03-18.
Benchmarks:
- SWE-bench Pro: 56.2%
- GPQA Diamond: 87.4%
- Terminal Bench 2: 57.0
- Toolathlon: 46.3
- AA Intelligence Index: 49.6
- AA Agentic Index: 61.5
- Hallucination Rate: 65.6%
Capabilities: autonomous coding, debugging, root-cause analysis, office-document generation, continuous self-improvement scaffolds.
Public sources: OpenRouter, NVIDIA NGC, HuggingFace model card, Artificial Analysis.
Notable caution: hallucination rate reported at 65.6% by Artificial Analysis.

Comparative metadata: weekly tokens 882B; context window 196,608 tokens; released 2026-03-18; pricing $0.3/M input and $1.2/M output.

Gemma 3 4B - Google's compact multimodal model for single-GPU deployment.

Benchmarks:
- MMLU: ~72%
- Multimodal reasoning (MMMU-class tasks)

Architecture: Dense transformer, 4B parameters.
Context: 128K tokens.

Capabilities: Multimodal (text + image), 128K context,
140+ languages, vision-language tasks including captioning and visual QA.

License: Gemma Terms of Use

Claude Sonnet 4.6 is a comparative catalog entry for Anthropic.

Weekly tokens: 1.46T.
Context Window: 1,000,000 tokens.
Released: 2026-02-17.
Pricing: $3 per 1M input tokens and $15 per 1M output tokens.
Capabilities: text, reasoning, coding, agentic, long context, safety.

Cogito 2.1 671B Cloud - Largest Cogito model with hybrid reasoning.

Architecture: Dense transformer, 671B parameters.
Context: 128K tokens.

Capabilities: Hybrid reasoning (instant vs deep thinking modes),
coding, STEM tasks, mathematical reasoning, advanced problem solving.
Instruction-tuned with human feedback.

License: MIT

Cogito 14B - Hybrid reasoning models optimized for coding and STEM.
Enable 'deep thinking subroutine' for complex reasoning tasks.
Strong performance on coding benchmarks with hybrid reasoning modes.

Architecture: Based on Llama architecture with hybrid reasoning enhancements.
Parameters: 14B active during inference.

Capabilities: Hybrid reasoning (instant vs deep thinking modes),
coding, STEM tasks, mathematical reasoning.

License: MIT

DeepCoder - Fully open-source 14B parameter code generation model.

Benchmarks:
- LiveCodeBench optimized for code generation
- Comparable to O3-mini level on coding tasks

Architecture: 14B dense transformer optimized for code.
Context: 8K tokens.

Capabilities: Code completion, code generation, programming tasks,
multiple programming languages support.

License: Open source (community model)

Embedding Gemma - 300M parameter text embedding model from Google.
Built on Gemma architecture for efficient text embedding.

Architecture: 300M dense transformer.
Context: 8K tokens.

Capabilities: Text embeddings, semantic search,
retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), sentence similarity.

License: Gemma Terms of Use
